mapper.select: SELECT t2.sample_name , t3.id as itemId, t3.times, t3.unit_price, t3.check_item_name, t3.state FROM test_entrusted_sample_details_rel AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_sample AS t2 ON t1.sample_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel AS t3 ON t3.sample_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrustment_id =#{entrustmentId} and t3.task_id = #{taskId}
SELECT id, verifyer_id verifyerId, issuer_id issuerId, sealer sealer FROM test_report_record
SELECT id, NAME, CODE FROM test_team WHERE del_flag = 0

SELECT t1.task_source taskSource, SUM( t1.actual_price ) actualPrice, SUM( t1.receivedPrice ) receivedPrice FROM ( SELECT t1.id, t1.acceptance_date, t1.task_source, t1.actual_price, IFNULL( t2.price, 0 ) receivedPrice FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_payment_record_info t2 ON t1.id = t2.entrustment_id WHERE t1.state != 144 ) t1
and t1.task_source = #{taskSource}
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY t1.task_source ORDER BY actualPrice DESC

SELECT t3.NAME teamName, t3.CODE teamCode, SUM( IFNULL( t2.discount, 1 ) * IFNULL( t4.unit_price, 0 ) ) taskPrice FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_team t3 ON t1.dept_id = t3.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t4 ON t1.id = t4.task_id
and t3.NAME = #{taskSource}
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY t3.NAME, t3.CODE ORDER BY taskPrice DESC
